description_long: This is a rectangular picnic basket with a deep reddish-brown woven exterior, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The basket features a hinged lid that opens upwards, revealing a spacious interior suitable for carrying food or personal items. Metal accents, including corner protectors and a central latch, add both durability and a decorative touch to the design. The weave is tight and uniform, suggesting strength and careful craftsmanship. The interior appears hollow, allowing for storage, and the lid is attached with visible metal hinges. The overall look is classic and functional, ideal for outdoor or urban leisure activities.
description: A rectangular, reddish-brown woven picnic basket with a hinged lid and metal accents, designed for carrying items. The basket has a classic, sturdy appearance with a spacious interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, central metal latch, and the spacious interior of the basket.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basket, the thickness of the lid, and the metal hinge mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the basket and the continuous woven pattern, with the lid partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same depth and hinge details as the other side, with the woven texture prominent.
attribute_handle_type: absent; no visible handle on the basket exterior
attribute_lid_presence: present; rectangular, hinged lid covering the top, attached with metal hinges
attribute_weave_pattern: tight, plain weave with uniform horizontal and vertical strands, giving a sturdy and consistent texture
attribute_closure_mechanism: metal latch at the front for securing the lid
